parsed_review.summary: CP00-509 is a descriptor-only governance-core pack (RP16.P08.M04.S19-RP16.P08.M06.S14, risk B, 40 units) and passes read-only review. The full evidence chain reconciles: closeout-pack-plan.json (CP00-509 is the live cursor), review-baseline.json, registry GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP509_PACK_BINDING, and contract current_pack all agree on pack_id/risk/unit_count/range/upstream(CP00-508)/next(CP00-510). Deliverable distribution (test 2 / implementation 17 / hermes_evidence 19 / claude_review 2) and micro-phase counts (M04 4 / M05 22 / M06 14) reconcile to 40 across baseline included_units, CP509_REQUIREMENTS, and the coverage validator. The pack-level production_ready claim is honestly false (manifest.json and command-evidence.json: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor); the only positive flag is the gated Hermes production_ready_candidate, which is a deterministic review-packet signal, not an enterprise-trust or runtime claim — no production_ready gate weakening. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in code (freezeCp509Result flag set; slice validator requires descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false on every row) and asserted by model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp16-governance-core-contract.mjs (rp16:governance-core:validate exit 0). Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer: descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, attestation promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, validated at script lines 1609-1616; enterprise trust is deferred to human final approval. Hermes control-plane patterns are confined to deterministic review packet/receipt generation (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ hardening blockers (auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing raw-output/source-inspection refs, final-approval/source-mutation/enterprise-trust over-claims) are present in forbidden_review_evidence; readiness auth-preflight passed and validation-report shows no forbidden tools with summary-only review prohibited. changed-file-scope.json correctly excludes the unrelated progress-control-room dirty files; index.js is unchanged because exports flow through export *. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this gating step and must be produced before commit per the hardened review sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
